categories.name: Lampshade project kits
categories.description: Kits organized around common shade problems: cracked liners, scorched fabric, missing fittings, and thrifted bases with the wrong proportions.

categories.name: Shade structures
categories.description: Wire frames, rings, spider fittings, uno adapters, clip-on fittings, harp sets, risers, reducers, and finials.

categories.name: Covering materials
categories.description: Styrene, linen panels, cotton prints, handmade paper, parchment sheets, silk-look fabric, binding tape, trim cord, and seam tape.

categories.name: Tools and adhesives
categories.description: Shade glue, double-sided tape, rotary cutters, craft knives, clips, burnishers, measuring tapes, curve templates, edge rollers, and heat-safe work mats.

categories.name: Light and finish support
categories.description: Diffuser sheets, bulb-spacing cards, shade proportion guides, fabric swatch packs, repair labels, project notebooks, and care cards.

categories.name: Room and use-case bundles
categories.description: Reading-lamp refresh, pair-of-nightstands recovery set, cottage pleat kit, midcentury drum kit, and rental-friendly shade upgrade pack.

products.name: Midcentury Drum Recovery Kit
products.description: Wire rings, translucent styrene, linen panel, seam tape, binding tape, and a proportion card for clean drum shade recovery.

products.name: Pleated Bedside Shade Kit
products.description: Cottage pleat fabric, clip guides, edge tape, trim cord, and notebook pages for repeating the second shade.

products.name: Parchment Empire Shade Kit
products.description: Empire frame, parchment sheets, diffuser sheet, burnisher, shade glue, and a bulb-spacing card.

products.name: Cracked-Liner Repair Kit
products.description: Replacement styrene, double-sided tape, seam tape, clips, repair label, and a care card for brittle shade interiors.

products.name: Thrifted-Base Fitting Bundle
products.description: Spider fitting, uno adapter, clip-on fitting, reducer, riser, harp set, and finial options for making a found base usable.

products.name: Linen Panel Pack
products.description: Linen panels sized for shade recovery work, suitable for drum, empire, and bedside proportions.

products.name: Parchment & Handmade Paper Sheets
products.description: Warm translucent papers for shade builds that need visible texture and a softer glow.

products.name: Edge Finishing Tray
products.description: Shade glue, trim cord, seam tape, clips, edge roller, and burnisher for smooth shade edges and durable seams.

products.name: Shade Proportion Guide Set
products.description: Measuring guide cards for base height, frame diameter, harp height, bulb spacing, and room-light use.

products.name: Reading-Lamp Refresh Bundle
products.description: Diffuser sheet, harp height card, warm linen panel, and bulb-spacing support for useful reading light.

products.name: Pair-of-Nightstands Recovery Set
products.description: Matched panels, repeated trim, twin project notebook pages, and measuring tape for a balanced bedside pair.

products.name: Rental-Friendly Shade Upgrade Pack
products.description: Clip-on fittings, reversible covering choices, reducers, and care cards for thrifted apartment lighting.
